name: [HIGH] CVE-2026-24842
statusMessage: node-tar: tar: node-tar: Arbitrary file creation via path traversal bypass in hardlink security check
statusTrace: node-tar,a Tar for Node.js, contains a vulnerability in versions prior to 7.5.7 where the security check for hardlink entries uses different path resolution semantics than the actual hardlink creation logic. This mismatch allows an attacker to craft a malicious TAR archive that bypasses path traversal protections and creates hardlinks to arbitrary files outside the extraction directory. Version 7.5.7 contains a fix for the issue.
